summary: Iteration 161 - Tested and fixed admin notification creation for quick-book endpoint. Verified export API, kit detection, price calculator modal, and CinematicKitAssembly petInfo integration.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in mira_routes.py quick-book endpoint: admin notification was failing due to NoneType error when user is None
Added 'pillar' field to QuickBookRequest model to support pillar categorization
Export API at /api/admin/export/products-with-tags works correctly for both CSV and JSON formats
Price calculator modal is mobile-responsive (fits within 390px viewport)
CinematicKitAssembly correctly accepts petInfo prop and uses it for personalized narration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin notification bug fixed in quick-book endpoint. All features working: export API, kit detection, price calculator modal, CinematicKitAssembly with petInfo.

details.products_csv: PASS - Returns CSV with proper headers

details.notification_creation: PASS - Admin notifications created in admin_notifications collection
details.pillar_support: PASS - QuickBookRequest now supports pillar field

details.compact_design: PASS - Uses smaller text sizes on mobile (text-xs, text-sm)

details.personalized_narration: PASS - getProductNarration uses petInfo for personalization
details.mira_integration: PASS - MiraChatWidget passes petInfo to CinematicKitAssembly

bugs_fixed.issue: NoneType error when creating admin notification for guest users
bugs_fixed.fix: Added null checks for user object before accessing properties
Added optional pillar field to QuickBookRequest model
